decision.reason: After table-ready pointer check, keypad/arrow movement symbols and a top-row control route produced no F0361/F0380 stops; source binding is known, but post-ready xdotool route events are not entering the DOS keyboard buffer.
decision.sdlTerminalCodeTranslationMismatch: not proven; source binding requires the exact I34E codes listed above

exactRuntimeBinding.physicalSource: PC extended Left arrow scancode 0x4B converted to 0x004B (K) by IO2.C:54-55
PC extended Up arrow scancode 0x48 converted to 0x004C (L) by IO2.C:47-50
PC extended Right arrow scancode 0x4D converted to 0x004D (M) by IO2.C:57-58
PC extended Down arrow scancode 0x50 converted to 0x0050 (P) by IO2.C:51-52

pointerCheck.displayQuirk: first byte high nibble elided in dosbox-debug data overview

sourceAudit.finding: Audited because INPUT.C contains platform input helpers, but the I34E PC34 path is selected through DEFS.H M527/M528 to IO2.C F0539/F0540, not these Amiga-family event handlers.
I34E reads G2162_IODriver->IODRV_00_GetKeyboardInput; extended arrows 0x1248/0x1250/0x124B/0x124D are normalized to 0x004C/0x0050/0x004B/0x004D.
I34E/I34M secondary movement table binds commands to 0x004B,0x004C,0x004D,0x004F,0x0050,0x0051.
P0728_KeyCode is compared against primary, then G0444 secondary table; matched entries queue commands and increment G2153_i_QueuedCommandsCount.
I34E queue count gates processing; turn/move commands call F0365/F0366.
M527/M528 poll keyboard buffer and feed F0361 before F0380 processes the queue.
G0444 is installed to G0459 movement table before ProcessNewPartyMap.
I34E-family builds use F0539_INPUT_Cconis/F0540_INPUT_Crawcin for M527/M528.
